After recent years of development experience and technology accumulation, the MacCMS program has gradually matured, with great advantages in ease of use and Functionally, it has become the leader in the industry. The program is small in size -> optimized program code, fast running speed -> efficient caching. It can be perfectly set up with an ordinary virtual host, and the cost of building a website is very low. With built-in tags, custom function tag interfaces, and powerful custom collection functions, as long as you know HTML, you can easily create a personalized website. The program has always actively adopted various advantages proposed by the majority of webmasters in terms of ease of use and functionality. suggestions and respond quickly to various emergency issues. config.s92: The third-level distribution function is not favored by many webmasters. It may be that some templates have not developed this part of the function. In fact, this fission promotion is very practical. If used well, it can bring considerable traffic to the website. Many people do not understand the three-level distribution implementation method and calculation ratio in MacCMSv10, which may also be the reason why the three-level distribution function is not favored.
config.s93: As long as your friend visits through your <r>invitation link</r> and registers as a member, your friend will be your first-level distributor. When your friend has points for consumption, you can Get first-level distribution commission. If your friend invites his friend and his friend registers as a member and consumes points, you can also get a second-level point reward. If his friend invites other people to register as a member and consume, you can also get a second-level distribution commission. You can get three-level points rewards, and the effective association reaches up to three levels. This is the three-level distribution and distribution association mechanism.

plugin.s40: <r>MacCMSv10</r> All plug-ins are stored in the <r>addons</r> directory. One plug-in is in one directory. The directory name must be the same as the plug-in ID, and all are in lowercase. This is not allowed. Special characters such as capital letters or underscores appear.
plugin.s42: The <r>application</r> folder will cover the root directory. These two folders are mainly used for the development of our backend management functions. We can first develop the corresponding management functions in the backend. , and then package the corresponding functions into the plug-in. MacCMS will automatically detect file conflicts when the plug-in is installed and uninstalled. If a conflicting file is encountered, the user will be reminded whether to overwrite or delete it.
plugin.s43: <r>assets</r> This folder is very important. <r>MacCMS</r> will copy all folders and files in <r>assets</r> to <r> /static/addons/plug-in identification/</r> folder, all files in the <r>assets</r> folder will not be subject to file conflict detection, <r>/static/addons/plug-in identification/< /r>For files in this directory, we can directly point to this path through <r>`__ADDON__`</r> in the view file. Therefore, when developing the view, we can use the relative path design first, and then add it uniformly after completion. Use the prefix of this <r>`__ADDON__`</r>
plugin.s44: The four folders <r>controller</r>, <r>lang</r>, <r>model</r> and <r>view</r> are the <r>MVC of our plug-in front-end function. </r> section, this part of the folder will not be copied or moved to other locations.
plugin.s45: <r>Mydemo.php</r> This file is the core file of the plug-in. We can write scripts in this file that are executed when the plug-in is installed or uninstalled, or write the generation or deletion of the menu in this plug-in. , and the behavior methods of the plug-in are also written in this file. The behavior events supported by the plug-in will be discussed later. The command rules of this file are to capitalize the first letter of the plug-in identifier.
plugin.s46: <r>bootstrap.js</r> This file is the startup file of the plug-in. After the plug-in is installed and enabled, <r>MacCMS</r> will merge the contents of this file into <r >/static//js/addons.js</r>, where you can write the core JS of the plug-in or register events. In this JS, you can use <r>require</r> to depend on other modules. Global objects such as <r>Fast</r>, <r>Backend</r>, and <r>Lang</r> can be used in the plug-in, because such objects have been loaded and registered before.
plugin.s47: <r>config.html</r> This file is the view template used when configuring the plug-in. It is optional. When it exists, clicking the configuration button in the plug-in management will call this view file.
plugin.s48: <r>config.php</r> This file is the configuration file of the plug-in. When we click the configuration button in the background plug-in management, it will be saved in this file. <r>config.php</r> Details Please refer to the configuration chapter for usage and instructions.
plugin.s49: This file is only used to save the basic information and opening status of the plug-in. The content format of this file is
plugin.s50: <r>install.sql</r> This file can only contain <r>SQL</r> statements. At the same time, <r>`__PREFIX__`</r> can be used in this file to represent the database Table prefix, MacCMS automatically replaces <r>install.sql</r> when installing and importing SQL, please refer to the database chapter
plugin.s52: Plug-ins are not allowed to tamper with, replace, or cms system files. They are only allowed to add configuration parameters without affecting the original functions, such as [backend menu configuration, playback group configuration]. If every developer does not abide by this rule , then the application market faces various mutual incompatibility issues, which will seriously affect the functions and security issues of the CMS itself. Developers must comply.

s40: Paging code can be used on category pages, filter pages, search pages, article content pages, guestbooks, comments, topic homepages, etc. The prerequisite for use is that the page has a tag that contains paging='yes' to obtain paging data.

It contains the hidden parameter <r>pageurl=""</r>. The default value for video is <r>vod/type</r>. The default for article paging is <r>art/type</r>. When paging This parameter must be added to avoid pagination errors!
For example:<r>{MacCMS:vod num="10" paging="yes" pageurl="vod/type" half="3"} {/MacCMS:vod}</r >
The <r>half</r> parameter is to set the number of paging digital page numbers to display. If not set, the default is <r>5</r>.

gl.s1: Global labels are global variables that can be called on all pages. The global array of MacCMSV10 is <r>$maccms</r>
gl.s2: You can also use the php global variable <r>$GLOBALS</r> to obtain it. Commonly used configurations are assigned to <r>$GLOBALS['config']</r>.
gl.s3: If the $maccms. tag is not enough and you want to call the contents of other configuration items, you can use $GLOBALS['config'] to get it
gl.s4: For example:<r>{$GLOBALS['config']['site']['site_name']}</r> Other items: You can debug and view the specific attributes included;

When the user logs out, it will be this<r>$ GLOBALS['user']</r> will become the guest user group. Guests are also considered user groups. The user id is 0 and the user group id is 1.

gl.s15: With the tp5 framework as a program driver, MacCMSV10 is actually far more powerful than we have known before. When the existing tp5 tags and cms tags cannot meet the needs, you can use template custom php. For example, some template manufacturers now move custom backends into templates. Although it is enough to show that template customization of PHP is very flexible, this approach is not officially recommended. Generally, custom processing functions are most commonly used.
gl.s16: Create the <r>php</r> folder in the template <r>html</r> directory and create an <r>extra.php</r> file
gl.s18: In this <r>extra.php</r>, you can use PHP to do whatever you want, including calling internal models, querying databases, and customizing API interfaces.
gl.s20: Then use template php to introduce the <r>extra.php</r> file in the template html file to execute the php code inside and use the functions defined inside:
gl.s21: You can use tp5 helper function (opens new window) to obtain background parameters
gl.s22: You can also use plug-in functions to call the parameters of a plug-in
gl.s23: In template customization PHP not only supports the calling of global general functions, but also supports the direct use of methods in the model, such as the original query method of the <r>MacCMS:vod</r> tag. It can be used <r>listCacheData()</r> method to simulate and meet some special requirements.
gl.s24: If the existing methods in the <r>model('Vod')</r> model cannot satisfy the query, you can also use the model + where() custom query statement.

wm.s12: You may encounter some unfamiliar concepts in the document. This section lists common terms in the document to facilitate use, learning, and plug-in/theme development.
wm.s13: It is a site that specifically provides data collection for other websites. The webmaster can directly connect to the API of the resource station in the background and update the website content in real time.
wm.s14: Video parsing refers to the act of piracy of genuine videos, and can remove advertisements and trial viewing time limits. Building and using parsing are both infringements and illegal acts. Please do not take the law personally.
wm.s15: Parsing interface <r>Parsing api that takes submission url as parameter</r>
wm.s18: Generally refers to the rules for crawling data of crawler software [Locomotive, Octopus]. This software needs to collect the target site and needs to be configured with crawling rules that comply with the website.
wm.s19: The CF here is not the CF in Tencent games. It is a foreign free website acceleration and protection tool. Its full name is <r>CloudFlare</r>. The official website is: <r>https://www.cloudflare .com/zh-cn/</r>. CloudFlare Web Application Firewall is an intelligent, integrated, and scalable solution that protects your business-critical web applications from malicious attacks without requiring changes to your existing infrastructure. .
wm.s20: Recently, there is a group of professional illegal production teams, which will notify you with the website brushing statistics: “<r>Your website is about to be blocked</r>, <r>We are about to attack your website</r >, <r>Your website will stop accessing at a certain time</r>” and other extortion messages. The purpose is to get you to cooperate with them and have their illegal advertisements posted on the website. If you refuse or ignore it, , they will carry malicious, sensitive, and political keywords in your request, causing your website to be temporarily blocked by the national firewall, making your website inaccessible in China.
wm.s21: 1. They usually attack the dns service first (causing some areas to be inaccessible, which feels like being blocked by a wall.) To put it bluntly, it is a DNS attack. [The solution can be to buy a dns.com parsing professional version that takes less than 1 year. For 200 yuan, you don’t have to poll cf anymore]
wm.s22: 2, then long-term attacks on illegal keywords (search pages and filter pages) will be included by search engines. This will eventually lead to the real wall~~~~ [Solution: upgrade to the latest version and enable fake wall defense]
wm.s23: 3. If your site has been searched for illegal words by the search engine, then quickly change the domain name, and turning on the defense will have no effect. If it is not included, congratulations on your rescue.
wm.s29: How to quickly move MacCMSv10 to a new server? This is a problem that every webmaster may encounter. Moving the MacCMS website is very simple. You only need to back up the database in the management background, and then go to the website directory Just package and upload it to the new server.
wm.s31: After uploading to the new server and decompressing it, the <r>\application\data\install\install.lock</r> file was deleted,
wm.s32: Open the domain name to enter the new installation interface, fill in the database configuration and background administrator account password to complete the installation
wm.s33: Restore completed backup data will replace all current data and restore the original website information and data, including the previous backend management account and password. The MacCMS website move is completed perfectly.

meta.description: MacCMS provides a modular hybrid app framework — build native apps using web technologies, with 200+ native features and 2000+ JS APIs. Start packaging apps with MacCMS!
meta.keywords: H5 packaging, app build, Android build, iOS build, macOS build, Windows build

feature.androidDesc: Quickly generate native Android apps with full device compatibility — no native Android programming required. Package your website or H5 directly to launch on Android fast!
feature.iosDesc: Generate Apple iOS apps with one click — no native iOS programming required. Build for both Android and iOS, iterate quickly, and prepare for the App Store!
feature.macosDesc: Package your website or H5 directly into a macOS desktop app — no macOS development experience required. Self-serve configuration lets even hobbyist webmasters ship desktop apps fast!
feature.windowsDesc: Package your website or H5 into a Windows desktop app with one click — no native programming required. Generate Windows-compatible desktop apps and reach more platforms!
